title: Sith Order (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Sith Empire}}
'''Sith Order''' can refer to the [[Sith]] in general, or one of its many organizations:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Sith]]'''
**The '''[[Sith Eternal]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Sith/Legends|Sith]]'''
**The '''[[Brotherhood of the Sith]]'''
**[[Sith Order (Sith Empire)|'''Sith Order''' (Sith Empire)]]
**The '''[[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]]'''
**[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane's]] '''[[Order of the Sith Lords]]'''
**'''[[Lumiya's Sith]]'''
**The '''[[Lost Tribe of Sith]]'''
**The '''[[One Sith]]''', also known as the '''New Sith Order'''
